steps.title: Convert the percentage increase to a growth factor
steps.content:
A 2.4% annual increase means each year the value grows to 100% + 2.4% = 102.4% of what it was. In decimal form:
$$1 + 0.024 = 1.024$$
Each year, the house value is multiplied by the growth factor 1.024.

steps.title: Apply the exponential growth model
steps.content:
Starting with \$174,000 and multiplying by 1.024 each year for $x$ years gives:
$$f(x) = 174,000(1.024)^x$$
This matches choice C — C is correct.
